title: Tracing Garbage Collection and Conservative Limits · Independent C Trial
summary: An independent maintainer ports the small mark-and-sweep collector model to a changed target with tighter memory, different input shape, injected allocation failure, and no worked solution. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of small mark-and-sweep collector model with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define objects, edges, roots, reachability, and collection safety independently from application usefulness.
Mark reachable objects, sweep only unmarked allocations, and reset metadata without losing new or mutated edges.
Explain false retention and invalid reclamation risks when arbitrary words may be treated as pointers.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Commit to the mission model · Lab Reachability Roots
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab native-systems team handles memory case 1082. Produce bounded C evidence to mark reachable objects and count only unreachable sweep candidates; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Define objects, edges, roots, reachability, and collection safety independently from application usefulness.

What must be established before implementation?
